productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Casual Brown Shoes
description: This rugged pair in a squared toe box design from lee cooper makes for a trendy statement combined with superior performance. It’s a perfect combination of enhanced cushioning and durability. These shoes offer superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish enough for casual wear. You can team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperLeather uppers for better comfort and durabilityStitch detailing for greater reinforcement and styleSquared toe box for more comfortLace-ups for a snug FitPadded collar and tongue for extra comfortLogo tab appliquéd on the tongue and attached on the sideTextile lining for greater comfortMidsoleShock-absorbing EVA midsole for enhanced comfortCushioned footbed for all day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole for durability and higher abrasion resistanceTextured horizontal ridges for better gripHeel for ergonomic comfortshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not store in direct sunlight
